discordBotToken.description: Discord bot token for reading channel history

channels.description: Channel IDs where the response framework is active

companions.description: Map of agentId to { name, botId, order } — defines each companion's display name, Discord bot user ID, and queue position

recentWindowMs.description: How far back to look for recent companion responses (ms). Default: 300000 (5 min)

lookbackMessages.description: How many recent Discord messages to fetch. Default: 15

emergencyKeywords.description: Keywords that bypass queue order and flag all companions. Default: [help, scared, hurting, emergency]

discordBotToken.label: Discord Bot Token
discordBotToken.help: Bot token for reading channel history. Falls back to global discord plugin token if not set.

channels.label: Active Channel IDs
channels.help: List of Discord channel IDs where response framework is active

companions.label: Companion Config
companions.help: Map of agentId to { name, botId, order }. Order 1 = responds first.

recentWindowMs.label: Recent Window (ms)
recentWindowMs.help: How far back to look for recent responses. Default 5 minutes.
